task.objective: Extract foundational utilities to separate files
task.motivation: These files have no dependencies on other db functions, making them safe to extract first. They form the foundation for other domain files.

constraints.constraint: Keep original functions in lib/db.ts (don't delete yet)
Update lib/db.ts to import from new files
Must pass npm run build after each file extraction

step.name: Create connection.ts
Create utils.ts
Create types.ts
Update lib/db.ts imports
step.action:
At the top of lib/db.ts, add imports from the new files and remove the duplicated code:
```typescript // Add these imports at the top import { getSql, setServiceAccountContext } from "./db/connection" import { generateTestSignature, isTestFlaky } from "./db/utils" import type { DateRangeFilter, FailedTestResult, ExecutionSummary, TrendPeriod, TrendOptions, TrendDataPoint, BranchStatistics, SuiteStatistics, GetFlakiestTestsOptions, GetFlakinessSummaryOptions, SlowestTest, SuitePassRate, OrgApiKey, OrgApiKeyWithHash, ReliabilityScoreOptions, PerformanceRegressionsOptions, ErrorDistributionOptions, ErrorDistributionItem, } from "./db/types"
// Re-export for backwards compatibility export { getSql, setServiceAccountContext } from "./db/connection" export { generateTestSignature, isTestFlaky } from "./db/utils" export type { DateRangeFilter, FailedTestResult, ExecutionSummary, TrendPeriod, TrendOptions, TrendDataPoint, BranchStatistics, SuiteStatistics, GetFlakiestTestsOptions, GetFlakinessSummaryOptions, SlowestTest, SuitePassRate, OrgApiKey, OrgApiKeyWithHash, ReliabilityScoreOptions, PerformanceRegressionsOptions, ErrorDistributionOptions, ErrorDistributionItem, } from "./db/types" ```
Then remove the duplicated definitions from lib/db.ts (the function bodies and interface definitions that are now in the new files).

step.name: Verify Build
step.action:
After each file creation, run: ```bash npm run build ```
Fix any type errors before proceeding.

step.name: Test Dashboard
step.action:
Start the dev server and verify dashboard loads: ```bash npm run dev ```
Check that metrics and data display correctly.

verification.check: lib/db/types.ts exists with all local interfaces
lib/db.ts imports from new files and re-exports

deliverables.deliverable: lib/db.ts - Updated with imports from new files

mandatory_final_step.action: UPDATE docs/prompts/db-abstraction-refactor/status.md with: - Date, Phase, Status - Files created - Any issues encountered - Next step link
